description:
This four-panel image displays Sentinel-2 satellite imagery and derived data for urban areas.
The top-left panel (a) shows a true-colour Sentinel-2 image of an urban area in Antwerpen, reference year 2018. White outlines, likely representing building footprints or urban blocks, are overlaid on the imagery.
The top-right panel (b) presents a true-colour Sentinel-2 image of the same urban area in Antwerpen, reference year 2021, also with white outlines. Visible changes include new construction and development in the upper right quadrant of the image between 2018 and 2021.
The bottom-left panel (c) is a heatmap illustrating the number of Sentinel-2 observations, as extracted from the Sen2Cor scene classification map, for an urban area in Madrid, reference year 2018. The colour gradient indicates the observation count, with dark blue representing low values and yellow/orange representing high values.
The bottom-right panel (d) shows the number of Sentinel-2 observations (from Sen2Cor scene classification map) for the same urban area in Madrid, reference year 2021, with white outlines of urban features superimposed. The heatmap pattern is similar to panel (c), indicating areas with concentrated high observation counts.
No scale bar, compass, or explicit legend for the heatmap's quantitative values are included within the image.
